qids.subject: Operating System
qids.prose: Each Process is coded as follows repeat P(mutex) {Critical section} V(mutex) forever The code for is identical except it uses V(mutex) in place of P(mutex). What is the largest number of processes that can be inside the critical section at any moment? A. B. C. D. None
